{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Archlord-level sacred instrument
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Flashing Knives leader]] wears an [[Archlord-level sacred instrument]] consisting of robes with silver threads of glistening chain and activated script.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
